properties.titulo_evento: Israel kills three Palestinians in strike on an aid kitchen in Gaza
properties.descricao: Israel bombed a kitchen that provided meals to the displaced in Gaza, killing three and injuring others.

properties.titulo_evento: Italy’s leaders visit victims of Modena car-ramming, stabbing attacks
properties.descricao: The attacks carried out by 31-year-old Salim El Khoudri appear related 'to a situation of psychiatric distress'.

properties.titulo_evento: Three community kitchen workers among five killed by Israel in Gaza
properties.descricao: Israeli attacks on Gaza have killed at least 871 Palestinians since the so-called ceasefire started last year.

properties.titulo_evento: Canadian FM: Is the US still a reliable ally?
properties.descricao: Anita Anand discusses Donald Trump, NATO, Israel, China and Canada’s international role.

properties.titulo_evento: Taiwan not to give up ‘free way of life under pressure’: President
properties.descricao: Lai says Taiwan will not provoke conflict with China, but will not forsake its dignity or democratic values.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel comes second at Eurovision amid boycotts and backlash
properties.descricao: Bulgaria won Eurovision, pushing Israel into second place amid boycotts and protests over Israel’s war on Gaza.

properties.titulo_evento: Large-scale Ukrainian drone attack kills three in Moscow region, says Russia
properties.descricao: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.

properties.titulo_evento: Hezbollah drone strike videos show evolving tactics against Israel
properties.descricao: BBC Verify has examined dozens of videos of fibre-optic drone attacks carried out by the Lebanese armed group.

properties.titulo_evento: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
properties.descricao: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.

properties.titulo_evento: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
properties.descricao: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.

properties.titulo_evento: Secret police and propaganda: The Chinese agents spying on expats in US
properties.descricao: Experts say two espionage cases in the US highlight China's attempts to peddle influence globally over the past decade.

properties.titulo_evento: The girl group who've sold out venues and toured the world - without releasing a record
properties.descricao: The all-female supergroup has sold out venues across the UK and Ireland, toured stadiums with Ed Sheeran, and built a global following - all without releasing a debut record.

properties.titulo_evento: Most of the architects of October 7 attacks have been killed, says Netanyahu
properties.descricao: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Sunday that Israel is close to finishing a key war aim in Gaza: killing the planners of the October 7 attacks. The comments came after Israel said it had killed senior Hamas commander Ezzedine Al-Haddad in an a...

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes Russia: Zelensky says response to Moscow's agression 'justified'
properties.descricao: Douglas Herbert has more.

properties.titulo_evento: "One Nation under God": US President Trump joins national prayer rally
properties.descricao: André Gagné, Full Professor and Chair, Concordia University of Montreal, Canada, is our guest.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia kills at least 4 and wound 12 others
properties.descricao: One of Ukraine's largest drone strikes on Russia killed at least four people, including three near Moscow, and wounded a dozen others, local authorities said Sunday. Debris fell on Russia's largest airport without causing damage.

properties.titulo_evento: UK leadership crisis: ‘Keir Starmer is a lame duck Prime Minister’ says former Labour adviser
properties.descricao: It’s been a tumultuous week for Britain’s Prime Minister, Sir Keir Starmer, who is facing a leadership crisis. Following a chaotic week in which nearly 90 Labour MPs called on Starmer to resign, along with a series of ministerial resignations, the P...

properties.titulo_evento: Around 10 'new' victims come forward in France's Epstein investigation
properties.descricao: French prosecutors investigating Jeffrey Epstein’s alleged trafficking network say around ten previously unidentified suspected victims have recently contacted authorities, widening a probe into possible abuse committed in France or involving French...

properties.titulo_evento: New Epstein victims turn up in French probe — prosecutor
properties.descricao: France is pursuing its own investigation into the Epstein affair, looking at potential crimes committed in the EU country or involving French nationals tied to the US sex offender.

properties.titulo_evento: German singer Heino pushes back against the far-right AfD
properties.descricao: A far‑right politician in Germany used schlager icon Heino in election advertising without his consent. Heino is now demanding compensation for pain and suffering.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian drones hit Russia in massive overnight attack
properties.descricao: Ukraine has launched almost 600 drones at Russia in one of its largest overnight attacks amid Moscow's invasion. The region around the Russian capital was one of those targeted.

properties.titulo_evento: German transport minister promotes green hydrogen in Japan
properties.descricao: During a recent visit to Japan, Germany's transport minister Patrick Schnieder toured hydrogen projects aimed at bringing the fuel into the mainstream.

properties.titulo_evento: Dead humpback whale off Denmark is 'Timmy'
properties.descricao: Divers have confirmed that a dead humpback whale spotted off Denmark is the same creature that spent weeks beached off Germany's Baltic coast. It comes two weeks after a contentious rescue operation.

properties.titulo_evento: India news: CNG gas price hiked in Delhi NCR amid Iran war fallout
properties.descricao: The price of CNG has increased in Delhi and the surrounding region for the second time in two days, as India grapples with the economic impact of the Iran war. Meanwhile, Modi is set to arrive in Sweden. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela deports Maduro ally Alex Saab to US
properties.descricao: Alex Saab fell out of favor with the new administration that took power since Maduro’s ouster and capture by US forces in January.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany gets ahead in the new space race
properties.descricao: German companies of all sizes and all over the country are developing satellites and space applications. They want to be part of the lucrative industry, which is increasingly crucial for civilian and military purposes.

properties.titulo_evento: US Trade rep tries to walk back Trump’s remarks on arms for Taiwan
properties.descricao: Jamieson Greer said President Donald Trump is "considering" how to approach a deal.

properties.titulo_evento: US, China and Russia prefer a divided Europe, Kallas warns
properties.descricao: The EU’s top diplomat said foreign powers dislike the bloc because it is stronger when it acts collectively — and cautioned member countries against cutting their own deals.

properties.titulo_evento: Eurovision faces tough questions over country participation
properties.descricao: The song contest's existential moment over Israel's participation is far from over.

properties.titulo_evento: The email glitch that blindsided Poland on US troop move
properties.descricao: Chief of the General Staff of the Polish Armed Forces received an alert as early as Monday, but most of Poland’s military found out about the canceled American deployment from the media.

properties.titulo_evento: China says preliminary agreement reached with US to lower some tariffs
properties.descricao: The two sides "agreed to promote two-way trade, including in agricultural products, through arrangements such as mutual tariff reductions on a range of products," the commerce ministry in Beijing said.

properties.titulo_evento: For Trump, Soaring Prices Test Voters’ Finances and Patience
properties.descricao: Just months before another election that may hinge on the economy, the war in Iran has sent gas and other goods soaring.

properties.titulo_evento: The Iran War Is Crippling One of the World’s Wealthiest Nations
properties.descricao: Iranian attacks and the stoppage of seaborne transit have paralyzed Qatar’s vital gas exports, stalling the economic pivots intended to anchor the country’s growth.

properties.titulo_evento: China Indicates Tariffs Were Discussed at Trump Summit
properties.descricao: China’s Ministry of Commerce said Saturday that the countries had struck a preliminary agreement to reduce some tariffs, seemingly contradicting statements by President Trump

properties.titulo_evento: U.S. Debt Is Now Bigger Than the Economy. That’s Not the Real Problem.
properties.descricao: Washington quickly brushed off a startling milestone in a mounting problem.

properties.titulo_evento: Which Countries Are Profiting From the Iran War Oil Shock
properties.descricao: An analysis of oil export data offers clues about which nations have benefited from higher prices, and which have lost a lot of revenue.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Rise as Trump-Xi Summit Yields No Clear Breakthroughs on Iran War
properties.descricao: Hopes for an end to the war in Iran faded after President Trump failed to secure a commitment from China to help persuade Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump Touts ‘Fantastic Trade Deals’ With China, but Details Are Scarce
properties.descricao: The president left Beijing following a summit with China, during which the two countries sought to stabilize their economic and political relations.
